exercises.analysis: smell 是系动词，后面用形容词 good 作表语。well 和 nicely 是副词。
多个形容词排列顺序：大小(big)在形状(round)前面。

exercises.stem: The news is very ___. I feel ___.
exercises.analysis: news 是物，用 -ing 形容词 surprising；人用 -ed 形容词 surprised。

exercises.stem: "She is a happily girl." is correct.
exercises.analysis: happily 是副词，不能修饰名词。应该用形容词 happy：She is a happy girl.

segments: The movie is very ___1___ (感兴趣的).
I am very ___2___ (感兴趣的) in it.
exercises.analysis: movie 是物，用 -ing 形容词 interesting；人用 -ed 形容词 interested。

exercises.question: 请用正确的形容词形式填空并说明理由：The children are ___ (excite) about the trip.
exercises.referenceAnswer: The children are excited about the trip. 理由：children 是人，应该用 -ed 结尾的形容词 excited，表示「感到兴奋的」。-ing 形容词修饰物或事。
